sourcesContent:
const AdminJourneyPage = () => (

🗺️ About the Admin Journey

Everything you need to know about the TechGear Admin Panel — what it does, how it works, and how to use it.

{/* What is the Admin Panel */}
⚙️ What is the Admin Panel?

The TechGear Admin Panel is a dedicated control center for administrators to monitor, analyze, and understand how users interact with the TechGear Store in real time. It gives full visibility into user activity, product performance, and purchase behavior — all from one place.

{[ { icon:'👥', title:'User Management', desc:'See every registered user, their activity stats, purchase history, and total spend.' }, { icon:'📦', title:'Product Intelligence',desc:'Track views, cart additions, and purchases for all 50 products. Spot hot sellers and dead stock instantly.' }, { icon:'🏆', title:'Sales Board', desc:'Live leaderboard of all products ranked by units sold. Starts at 0 and grows as users purchase.' }, { icon:'📋', title:'Event Stream', desc:'Real-time feed of every action taken across the platform — views, cart adds, and purchases.' }, ].map((item, i) => (
{item.icon}
{item.title}
{item.desc}
))}
{/* Admin Workflow */}
🚀 How the Admin Journey Works
{[ { step:1, icon:'🔑', title:'Admin Registers', desc:'Admin creates an account using the secret registration code. Role is set to "admin" — gives access to all protected endpoints.', color:'danger' }, { step:2, icon:'📊', title:'Views Dashboard', desc:'After login, the admin lands on the Dashboard showing platform-wide KPIs — total users, total events, purchases, and revenue.', color:'primary' }, { step:3, icon:'👁️', title:'Monitors Users', desc:'The All Users page lists every shopper with their view count, cart additions, purchases, and total spend. Click any user to see their full event history.', color:'info' }, { step:4, icon:'🏆', title:'Checks Sales Board', desc:'The Sales Board shows all 50 products ranked by units sold. Every product starts at 0 and climbs as users complete purchases.', color:'warning' }, { step:5, icon:'🛒', title:'Reviews Tracker', desc:'Purchase Tracker gives a performance breakdown — hot, normal, slow, and dead products — with revenue and conversion rate per item.', color:'success' }, { step:6, icon:'📋', title:'Reads Event Feed', desc:'The Recent Events page streams the last 100 user actions across the whole platform, filterable by action type.', color:'secondary'}, ].map(s => (
Step {s.step} {s.icon}
{s.title}

{s.desc}

))}
{/* Sidebar Guide */}
🧭 Sidebar Navigation Guide
{[ { icon:'📊', page:'Dashboard', info:'Overview KPIs — users, events, purchases, revenue, and top-selling product at a glance.' }, { icon:'👥', page:'All Users', info:'Full user list with stats. Click a user to open a modal with their complete purchase history.' }, { icon:'📦', page:'Product Catalog', info:'Browse all 50 products with their real-time sales data overlaid. View-only — no cart.' }, { icon:'🏆', page:'Sales Board', info:'Products ranked by units sold. Filters by category, search by name, bar chart per product.' }, { icon:'🛒', page:'Purchase Tracker', info:'Performance table with hot/normal/slow/dead labels, revenue, and conversion rates.' }, { icon:'📋', page:'Recent Events', info:'Live feed of the last 100 user actions across the entire platform. Filter by event type.' }, { icon:'🗺️', page:'Journey (this page)', info:'This page — explains what the admin panel does and how to use it.' }, ].map((row, i) => ( ))}
Icon Page What You Can Do Here
{row.icon} {row.page} {row.info}
{/* Access & Security */}
🔐 Access & Security
{[ { icon:'🛡️', title:'Admin-Only Routes', desc:'Every admin page is protected by a Bearer token. Without a valid admin token, all API calls return 403 Forbidden.' }, { icon:'🔑', title:'Registration Code', desc:'To create an admin account you must enter the secret code: TECHGEAR_ADMIN_2026. Without it, signup is blocked.' }, { icon:'💾', title:'Persistent Data', desc:'When MongoDB is running, all accounts, events, and stats are saved permanently across restarts. Always start mongod first.' }, { icon:'🔄', title:'Session Handling', desc:'Admin sessions are stored in sessionStorage — they expire when the browser tab is closed, keeping the panel secure on shared machines.' }, ].map((item, i) => (
{item.icon}
{item.title}
{item.desc}
))}
); export default AdminJourneyPage;
